positive: A minimalist, symmetrical representation of a stylized cosmic nebula and geometric celestial bodies. The composition should feature deep indigo and vibrant teal gradients merging with luminous gold accents, creating a 'galaxy contained' effect. A central grouping of interconnected, abstract star shapes and stylized constellations form the main subject, giving the impression of profound depth. The style should be a mix of ethereal watercolor wash and crisp, vector-like line work, ensuring clean silhouettes against a dark background. Ideal for apparel printing, with maximum contrast and clear edges, rendered as a circular/radial composition.
negative: blur, fuzzy, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, grain, amateur drawing, artifacts, messy, dirty, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, monochrome
